sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2026-01-15 15:01
- Distance: 0.5 km
- Moving time: 3:30
- Elapsed time: 3:33
- Elevation gain: 17.4 m
- Average heart rate: 184.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 198 bpm
- Average watts: 206 W
- Average speed: 8.9 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `43` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `185.3 bpm`, ranging from `148.0` to `198.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `177.1 bpm` and second-half average HR was `193.8 bpm` (+16.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `168.4 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `210.0 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `168.7 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `168.0 spm` (-0.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:46 /km` across `0.517 km` in `3:30` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:22 /km` and second-half pace was `7:09 /km` (+47 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `184.4 bpm` average and `198 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `174.0 bpm` in the first half and `193.3 bpm` in the second (+19.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `3:30` out of `3:33` elapsed (98.6%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `2` stop segments and `1.9%` stationary samples, so the run stayed very continuous.

- Strava logged about `18.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `42.8 m` and `60.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `4.2 m` in the first half and `14.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
